sqlMap.select: select * from ApplInvestBySECLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ApplInvestBySECLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ClientName DateOfWithdraw DescOfWithdraw LastUpdateTimeStamp LastUpdateUserID CreatedDate CreatedBy VersionKey ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ClientName# #DateOfWithdraw# #DescOfWithdraw# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #LastUpdateUserID# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# #VersionKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('ApplInvestBySECLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ApplInvestBySECKey, ClientName, DateOfWithdraw, DescOfWithdraw, LastUpdateTimeStamp, LastUpdateUserID, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ApplInvestBySECLW where ApplInvestBySECKey = #ApplInvestBySECKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ApplInvestBySECLW set
ClientName = #ClientName# ClientName = null DateOfWithdraw = #DateOfWithdraw# DateOfWithdraw = null DescOfWithdraw = #DescOfWithdraw# DescOfWithdraw = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null
where ApplInvestBySECKey = #ApplInvestBySECKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ApplInvestBySECLW where ApplInvestBySECKey = #ApplInvestBySECKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ApplInvestBySECLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ApplInvestBySECKey, ClientName, DateOfWithdraw, DescOfWithdraw, LastUpdateTimeStamp, LastUpdateUserID, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ApplInvestBySECLW where ApplInvestBySECKey = #ApplInvestBySECKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ApplInvestBySECKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ClientName, DateOfWithdraw, DescOfWithdraw, LastUpdateTimeStamp, LastUpdateUserID, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey from ApplInvestBySECLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
